data.title: Criteo appoints Wilfried Schobeiri as SVP, Head of Product, Performance Media to shape platform-first strategy.
data.description: In his new role as Senior Vice President and Head of Product for Performance Media, Schobeiri is set to play a key role in shaping Criteo's direction as a platform-centric business. This move aims to bring about increased value for brands and agencies. The announcement was made in New York on July 24, 2025. Criteo, a global platform facilitating connections within the commerce ecosystem, revealed this strategic development. The company is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CRTO.

data.title: 5G Standalone adoption increases, leading 5G MCN market to 6% growth; MEC rises at 17% CAGR driven by AI.
data.description: A report from Dell'Oro Group, a leading market information provider in the telecommunications industry, reveals a remarkable 17 percent Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) in the Media Edge Computing (MEC) sector. This growth is attributed to the increasing utilization of Network APIs, Network Slicing, and RedCap technologies. The report, published on July 24, 2025, indicates a significant surge in MEC adoption due to these innovative solutions. Dell'Oro Group continues to be a reliable source for insights into the telecommunications, security, networks, and data sectors.

data.title: Trinasolar recognized as "Workplace for All" in Greater China by Bloomberg Green on July 17, 2025 for commitment to employee development and diversity.
data.description: In Changzhou, China on July 24, 2025, Trinasolar was named by Bloomberg Green as the "Workplace for All" in Greater China. The company was recognized for its dedication to employee growth and innovation, along with its initiatives in promoting diversity and sustainability in the workplace. The award highlights Trinasolar's contribution to creating an inclusive and forward-thinking work environment.

data.title: AAON schedules Q2 2025 conference call on July 24, 2025. Leader in HVAC solutions. (Count: 81)
data.description: A company based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, AAON, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAON), known for providing top-notch energy-efficient HVAC solutions, has disclosed the date for its upcoming quarterly conference call and webcast. Scheduled for July 24, 2025, the event aims to connect with stakeholders and interested individuals to discuss the company's performance and future prospects. AAON is recognized for its commitment to delivering lasting value to clients and stakeholders through innovative HVAC technologies.

data.title: Scopio Labs introduces AI-driven CBM analyzing 10x more cells than standard, aiding lab efficiency amidst staffing crisis.
data.description: The introduction of Scopio's Complete Blood Morphology (CBM®) marks a significant advancement in lab automation by analyzing 10 times more cells than the current industry standard for blood cell morphology. This innovation is crucial in addressing the worldwide laboratory staffing shortage and speeding up hematology workflows. This breakthrough is expected to enhance efficiencies in labs globally, providing a solution to a critical challenge faced by the industry.

data.title: FTX set to start $1.9B payouts in September without disputes over repayments to disputed jurisdictions, creditors report.
data.description: Creditors have revealed that FTX's upcoming $1.9 billion distribution is unlikely to include repayments to jurisdictions previously scrutinized in a motion. The motion, which is being revised, will not involve repayments to the questioned jurisdictions as per information provided by the creditors.

data.title: Heritage Financial's Q2 2025 net income: $12.2M, $0.36 per diluted share; declares dividend of $0.24 per share.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, the company reported a net income of $12.2 million, translating to earnings of $0.36 per diluted share. This was a decrease from the first quarter of 2025, where a net income of $13.9 million, or $0.40 per diluted share, was recorded. During this quarter, there was a pre-tax loss of $6.9 million from the sale of securities, leading to a negative impact of $0.15 per share.

data.title: ATP Flight School raises $85,000 for Angel Flight West at Alumni Charity Golf Tournament in California.
data.description: In Jacksonville Beach, Florida on July 24, 2025, ATP Flight School organized a fundraising event – the Alumni Charity Golf Tournament – held at Monarch Beach Golf Links in Dana Point, California. The event aimed to support Angel Flight West, a non-profit organization that offers complimentary air travel services to patients requiring critical medical attention. This initiative showcases the commitment of ATP Flight School in giving back to the community and helping those in need.

data.title: CNB Financial Corp merges with ESSA Bancorp Inc on July 23, 2025; ESSA's bank, ESSA Bank, operates under CNB Bank's brand.
data.description: On July 23, 2025, CNB Financial Corporation successfully finalized the merger of ESSA Bancorp, Inc. with CNB, as announced on July 24, 2025. This merger included the consolidation of ESSA Bank & Trust into CNB Bank, with ESSA's offices now functioning under the name ESSA Bank, a division of CNB Bank. CNB Financial Corporation, traded on NASDAQ as CCNE, oversaw this significant acquisition in the financial sector.
Bank of England to cut bank rate by 25 bps each quarter to 3.75% at end-2025 same as June poll - Poll.
UK GDP growth to average 1.1% in 2025, 1.2% in 2026 vs 1.0%; 1.2% June poll - Poll.

data.title: Shafer Vineyards' One Point Five Cabernet Sauvignon now in United Airlines Polaris business class.
data.description: In the heart of Napa Valley, Shafer Vineyards, a prestigious winery with a rich history, revealed on July 24, 2025, that their iconic Cabernet Sauvignon, One Point Five, is now featured on United Airlines flights within the United Polaris business class. This collaboration brings the esteemed wine to passengers, enhancing their in-flight experience.
EU to keep trade retaliation in reserve even as deal with US nears - FT.

data.title: Acushnet Holdings Corp. will announce Q2 2025 financial results on August 7, 2025, at 6:45 a.m. Eastern Time.
data.description: Acushnet Holdings Corp. (NYSE: GOLF) based in Fairhaven, Mass., is set to release its second quarter 2025 financial results on August 7, 2025, around 6:45 a.m. Eastern Time. The company will make the results accessible through its Investor Relations website (http://www.acushnetholdingscorp.com/ir) as well as on the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's website. Investors and stakeholders can expect insights into Acushnet's performance during this period from the upcoming announcement.

data.title: Advance Auto Parts shared preliminary Q2 2025 financial highlights; focused on strategic goals.
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, Advance Auto Parts, Inc. (NYSE: AAP), a prominent automotive aftermarket parts supplier in North America catering to professional installers and DIY customers, released early financial highlights for the second quarter of 2025. The company is concentrating on executing strategic plans to enhance business operations. The preliminary results for the second quarter show promising figures in line with the higher end of expectations.
